answers: YouTube: hook in first 10 seconds, SEO in title/description/tags, consistent upload schedule, engage community.
Growing on youtube takes consistency, quality content, and genuine engagement.
Social media success: provide value, be authentic, engage with community, and analyze what works.
Start with one platform, master it, then expand. Quality content and consistency beat everything else.

feelings.question: how to start a youtube cooking channel?
feelings.answer:
YouTube: hook in first 10 seconds, SEO in title/description/tags, consistent upload schedule, engage community.

Also regarding social media: YouTube tips: good thumbnail + title = clicks.

On the vlogging side: Vlogging tips: be authentic, plan a rough outline, shoot in good lighting, and edit for pacing (cut boring parts).
